channel.title: Adapter Pattern on Aman Goyal
channel.description: Recent content in Adapter Pattern on Aman Goyal

item.title: The Adapter Pattern: Standardizing Application Interfaces
item.description: Core Concept Adapter pattern = modify interface of an application (without changing it) Implemented as a side container that: Transforms outputs/inputs Makes app conform to a standard interface Think: “Wrap your app so it speaks the standard language” Why Adapters Are Needed Real systems are heterogeneous: Different languages Different logging formats Different monitoring interfaces But ops needs: Unified interfaces for: Monitoring Logging Health checks Key Benefits 1. Standardization Converts different formats → one common format Example: Redis metrics → Prometheus format 2.
